description: Establish clear criteria for how notifications will be prioritized using machine learning algorithms.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a set of user engagement metrics, WHEN the prioritization criteria are applied, THEN notifications should be ranked according to their relevance score.

story_title: Integrate ML Model for Notification Prioritization
description: Develop and integrate a machine learning model that can analyze user behavior and prioritize notifications accordingly.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a trained machine learning model, WHEN it processes user data, THEN it should output prioritized notifications with a confidence score.

story_title: Implement User Feedback for Notification Relevance
description: Create a feedback mechanism that allows users to rate the relevance of notifications, which will help refine the ML model.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification displayed to the user, WHEN the user provides feedback, THEN the feedback should be recorded and associated with the notification for future analysis.

story_title: Implement Monitoring and Alerting for Notification System
description: Set up monitoring and alerting systems to track the performance of the notification prioritization system.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification prioritization system is live, WHEN performance metrics are collected, THEN alerts should trigger if performance falls below defined thresholds.

story_title: Create Documentation for Notification Prioritization System
description: Create comprehensive documentation for the notification prioritization system, including user guides and technical specifications.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification prioritization system is developed, WHEN documentation is created, THEN it should cover all aspects of system functionality and user interaction.
